samples.xml_description:
<module id="multi_pipe_4bit">
    <description>Implement a 4-bit unsigned number pipeline multiplier with two levels of registers to store intermediate values and control the multiplication process.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rst_n">Active-low reset signal.</input>
        <input id="mul_a" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit multiplicand.</input>
        <input id="mul_b" width_description="[3:0]">4-bit multiplier.</input>
        <output id="mul_out" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit product output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <constant id="size">4</constant>
    </parameter_description>
    <implementation>
        // Extend input signals by adding 'size' number of zero bits at the most significant bit positions
        wire [3:0] a_ext = {4{1'b0}} | mul_a;
        wire [3:0] b_ext = {4{1'b0}} | mul_b;
        
        // Generate partial products based on the multiplier's bits
        genvar i;
        generate
            for(i = 0; i < size; i = i + 1) begin : pp_gen
                wire [3:0] pp_i = (b_ext[i]) ? (a_ext << i) : 'd0;
            end
        endgenerate
        
        // Registers to store intermediate sums
        reg [7:0] r_sum[0:size-1];
        
        integer j;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                for(j = 0; j < size; j = j + 1) begin
                    r_sum[j] <= 8'd0;
                end
            end else begin
                for(j = 0; j < size; j = j + 1) begin
                    r_sum[j] <= r_sum[j] + pp_gen[j].pp_i;
                end
            end
        end
        
        // Final product calculation
        reg [7:0] mul_out_reg;
        always @(posedge clk or negedge rst_n) begin
            if(!rst_n) begin
                mul_out_reg <= 8'd0;
            end else begin
                mul_out_reg <= r_sum[0] + r_sum[1] + r_sum[2] + r_sum[3];
            end
        end
        
        assign mul_out = mul_out_reg;
    </implementation>
</module>
